lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀਰਾਗ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਬੇਣੀ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥ ਪਹਰਿਆ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਗਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sreeraag baanee bhagat benee jeeo kee | pahariaa kai ghar gaavanaa |
lines.english: Sree Raag, The Word Of Devotee Baynee Jee: To Be Sung To The Tune Of "Pehray":

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਨਰ ਗਰਭ ਕੁੰਡਲ ਜਬ ਆਛਤ ਉਰਧ ਧਿਆਨ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: re nar garabh kunddal jab aachhat uradh dhiaan liv laagaa |
lines.english: O man, when you were coiled in the cradle of the womb, upside-down, you were absorbed in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਰਤਕ ਪਿੰਡਿ ਪਦ ਮਦ ਨਾ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਏਕੁ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਸੁ ਨਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: miratak pindd pad mad naa ahinis ek agiaan su naagaa |
lines.english: You took no pride in your perishable body; night and day were all the same to you-you lived unknowing, in the silence of the void.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇ ਦਿਨ ਸੰਮਲੁ ਕਸਟ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਖ ਅਬ ਚਿਤੁ ਅਧਿਕ ਪਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: te din samal kasatt mahaa dukh ab chit adhik pasaariaa |
lines.english: Remember the terrible pain and suffering of those days, now that you have spread out the net of your consciousness far and wide.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਭ ਛੋਡਿ ਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਮੰਡਲ ਆਇਆ ਤਉ ਨਰਹਰਿ ਮਨਹੁ ਬਿਸਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: garabh chhodd mrit manddal aaeaa tau narahar manahu bisaariaa |1|
lines.english: Leaving the womb, you entered this mortal world; you have forgotten the Lord from your mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਪਛੁਤਾਵਹਿਗਾ ਮੂੜਿਆ ਤੂੰ ਕਵਨ ਕੁਮਤਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: fir pachhutaavahigaa moorriaa toon kavan kumat bhram laagaa |
lines.english: Later, you will regret and repent-you fool! Why are you engrossed in evil-mindedness and skepticism?

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੇਤਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਜਾਹਿਗਾ ਜਨੁ ਬਿਚਰੈ ਅਨਰਾਧਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chet raam naahee jam pur jaahigaa jan bicharai anaraadhaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Think of the Lord, or else you shall be led to the City of Death. Why are you wandering around, out of control? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸੁ ਮਿਸੁ ਮੇਧੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਬਿਖੁ ਚਾਖੀ ਤਉ ਪੰਚ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਸੰਤਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: ras mis medh amrit bikh chaakhee tau panch pragatt santaapai |
lines.english: Tasting good and bad, you eat nectar and then poison, and then the five passions appear and torture you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਲ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਚਿੰਦ ਰਸ ਲਾਗਾ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: baal binod chind ras laagaa khin khin mohi biaapai |
lines.english: You play like a child, craving sweets; moment by moment, you become more entangled in emotional attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਸੁਕ੍ਰਿਤ ਮਤਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਅਰਾਧਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam chhodd sukrit mat raam naam na araadhiaa |
lines.english: Abandoning meditation, penance and self-restraint, and the wisdom of good actions, you do not worship and adore the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਛਲਿਆ ਕਾਮੁ ਕਾਲ ਮਤਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਤਉ ਆਨਿ ਸਕਤਿ ਗਲਿ ਬਾਂਧਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: auchhaliaa kaam kaal mat laagee tau aan sakat gal baandhiaa |2|
lines.english: You are overflowing with sexual desire, and your intellect is stained with darkness; you are held in the grip of Shakti's power. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਰੁਣ ਤੇਜੁ ਪਰ ਤ੍ਰਿਅ ਮੁਖੁ ਜੋਹਹਿ ਸਰੁ ਅਪਸਰੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tarun tej par tria mukh joheh sar apasar na pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: In the heat of youthful passion, you look with desire upon the faces of other men's wives; you do not distinguish between good and evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤ ਸੰਪਤਿ ਦੇਖਿ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਗਰਬਿਆ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤੇ ਖੋਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sut sanpat dekh ihu man garabiaa raam ridai te khoeaa |
lines.english: Gazing upon your children and your property, your mind is proud and arrogant; you cast out the Lord from your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨਮਤ ਕਾਮਿ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਭੂਲੈ ਪਾਪੁ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aunamat kaam mahaa bikh bhoolai paap pun na pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: Drunk with sexual desire and other great sins, you go astray, and do not distinguish between vice and virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਮਰਤ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਤੋਲੇ ਤਉ ਭਗ ਮੁਖਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਵਿਗੋਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: avar marat maaeaa man tole tau bhag mukh janam vigoeaa |3|
lines.english: When others die, you measure your own wealth in your mind; you waste your life in the pleasures of the mouth and sexual organs. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਚਨ ਸ੍ਰਮਹਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਬਲ ਨਾਠੀ ਤਾ ਕਾਮੁ ਪਵਸਿ ਮਾਧਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: lochan srameh budh bal naatthee taa kaam pavas maadhaanee |
lines.english: Your eyes water, and your intellect and strength have left you; but still, your sexual desire churns and drives you on.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਡਰ ਕੇਸ ਕੁਸਮ ਤੇ ਧਉਲੇ ਸਪਤ ਪਾਤਾਲ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: punddar kes kusam te dhaule sapat paataal kee baanee |
lines.english: Your hair is whiter than the jasmine flower, and your voice has grown feeble, as if it comes from the seventh underworld.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਬਿਖੈ ਭਈ ਮਤਿ ਪਾਵਸਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਕਮਲੁ ਕੁਮਲਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: taa te bikhai bhee mat paavas kaaeaa kamal kumalaanaa |
lines.english: And so, your intellect has dried up through corruption, and the lotus flower of your body has wilted and withered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਤਿ ਬਾਣਿ ਛੋਡਿ ਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਮੰਡਲਿ ਤਉ ਪਾਛੈ ਪਛੁਤਾਣਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: avagat baan chhodd mrit manddal tau paachhai pachhutaanaa |4|
lines.english: You have forsaken the Bani, the Word of the Immortal Lord, in this mortal world; in the end, you shall regret and repent. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਕੁਟੀ ਦੇਹ ਦੇਖਿ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਮਾਨ ਕਰਤ ਨਹੀ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: nikuttee deh dekh dhun upajai maan karat nahee boojhai |
lines.english: Gazing upon the tiny bodies of your children, love has welled up within your heart; you are proud of them, but you do not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਚੁ ਕਰੈ ਜੀਵਨ ਪਦ ਕਾਰਨ ਲੋਚਨ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: laalach karai jeevan pad kaaran lochan kachhoo na soojhai |
lines.english: You long for the dignity of a long life, but your eyes can no longer see anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਕਾ ਤੇਜੁ ਉਡਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਪੰਖੀ ਘਰਿ ਆਂਗਨਿ ਨ ਸੁਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: thaakaa tej uddiaa man pankhee ghar aangan na sukhaaee |
lines.english: Your light has gone out, and the bird of your mind has flown away; you are no longer welcome in your own home and courtyard.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਣੀ ਕਹੈ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਰੇ ਭਗਤਹੁ ਮਰਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਿਨਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: benee kahai sunahu re bhagatahu maran mukat kin paaee |5|
lines.english: Says Baynee, listen, O devotee: who has ever attained liberation after such a death? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag |
lines.english: Sree Raag:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਹੀ ਮੋਹੀ ਮੋਹੀ ਤੋਹੀ ਅੰਤਰੁ ਕੈਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: tohee mohee mohee tohee antar kaisaa |
lines.english: You are me, and I am You-what is the difference between us?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਨਕ ਕਟਿਕ ਜਲ ਤਰੰਗ ਜੈਸਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kanak kattik jal tarang jaisaa |1|
lines.english: We are like gold and the bracelet, or water and the waves. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਪੈ ਹਮ ਨ ਪਾਪ ਕਰੰਤਾ ਅਹੇ ਅਨੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jau pai ham na paap karantaa ahe anantaa |
lines.english: If I did not commit any sins, O Infinite Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਕੈਸੇ ਹੁੰਤਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: patit paavan naam kaise huntaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: how would You have acquired the name, 'Redeemer of sinners'? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑ ਜੁ ਨਾਇਕ ਆਛਹੁ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: tuma ju naaeik aachhahu antarajaamee |
lines.english: You are my Master, the Inner-knower, Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇ ਜਨੁ ਜਾਨੀਜੈ ਜਨ ਤੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prabh te jan jaaneejai jan te suaamee |2|
lines.english: The servant is known by his God, and the Lord and Master is known by His servant. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰੀਰੁ ਆਰਾਧੈ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਦੇਹੂ ॥
lines.translit: sareer aaraadhai mo kau beechaar dehoo |
lines.english: Grant me the wisdom to worship and adore You with my body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਸਮ ਦਲ ਸਮਝਾਵੈ ਕੋਊ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ravidaas sam dal samajhaavai koaoo |3|
lines.english: O Ravi Daas, one who understands that the Lord is equally in all, is very rare. ||3||
